No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is an advanced statistics method course for Education graduate students, directly building capacity for high-quality educational research and thesis writing, aligning with tertiary education and skill development for research (Targets 4.3, 4.4).
evidence: 高階統計學方法課程之一 (one of the advanced statistics method courses)
為未來的學位論文撰寫、文獻閱讀、資料分析、與量化研究報告的撰寫，奠定良好與紮實的基礎 (lay a good and solid foundation for future thesis writing, literature reading, data analysis, and quantitative research report writing)

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While research skills are valuable, the course does not explicitly focus on economic growth, job creation, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research capabilities and fosters the ability to propose innovative solutions, aligning with Target 9.5.
evidence: 具備執行研究與解決問題的能力 (Ability to conduct research and solve problems)
具備提出創新性問題解決的研究能力 (Research capacity to propose innovative solutions to problems)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: While research can inform policy, the course does not explicitly focus on peace, justice, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly supports statistical capacity-building by equipping students with advanced data analysis skills for quantitative research, crucial for generating high-quality data and measuring progress on SDGs (Targets 17.18, 17.19).
evidence: 具有獨立分析資料的技術能力 (the technical ability to independently analyze data)
量化研究報告的撰寫 (quantitative research report writing)
